text:
`LlmCallRow`/`NewLlmCall` (llm_calls.rs): `id: i64`, `session_id: String`, `window_hash: String`, `provider: String`, `model: String`, `system_prompt: String`, `transcript_slice: String`, `raw_response: String`, `parsed_title: Option<String>`, `parsed_activity: Option<String>`, `created_at: i64` (passed in, never clock-read). [...] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS llm_calls (
    id               INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    session_id       TEXT NOT NULL,
    window_hash      TEXT NOT NULL,
    provider         TEXT NOT NULL,
    model            TEXT NOT NULL,
    system_prompt    TEXT NOT NULL,
    transcript_slice TEXT NOT NULL,
    raw_response     TEXT NOT NULL,
    parsed_title     TEXT, parsed_activity TEXT,
    created_at       INTEGER NOT NULL
); [...] `ReceiptRow`/`NewReceipt` (receipts.rs): `id: i64`, `surface: String` ("subscriptions"|"status"|"hook_context"), `transaction_id: i64`, `revision: i64`, `changed_summary: String` (JSON), `commands: String` (JSON array of `{kind,key,reason}`), `artifact_ref: Option<String>`, `created_at: i64`. [...] CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS receipts (
    id               INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    surface          TEXT NOT NULL,
    transaction_id   INTEGER NOT NULL,
    revision         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    changed_summary  TEXT NOT NULL,
    commands         TEXT NOT NULL,
    artifact_ref     TEXT,
    created_at       INTEGER NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_receipts_surface ON receipts(surface, created_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_receipts_artifact_ref ON receipts(artifact_ref); [...] ```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trellis_commits (
  id INTEGER PK AUTOINCREMENT, surface TEXT, transaction_id INTEGER, revision INTEGER,
  trigger_kind TEXT, changed_inputs_json TEXT, changed_derived_json TEXT,
  changed_collections_json TEXT, command_count INTEGER, output_count INTEGER,
  noop INTEGER, duration_us INTEGER, graph_nodes INTEGER, created_at INTEGER);
CREATE INDEX idx_trellis_commits_surface ON trellis_commits(surface, created_at);
